title: How Senior Engineers Actually Build with AI in 2026 | Build a Full Stack Job Applications Platform
summary: JavaScript Mastery demonstrates JobPilot, a full-stack platform that builds job application systems using AI agents with context files and open-source agent skills. The workflow emphasizes system design around AI agents to prevent drift and keep shipping real projects. The platform integrates InsForge for authentication, Browserbase for web scraping, and PostHog for analytics.
